title: tephrosia pedicellata
intro: Tephrosia pedicellata, also known as the "yellow leaf calycina", is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its yellow flowers and distinctive yellow leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of rotenone and other bioactive compounds. Tephrosia pedicellata is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may provide various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In some traditional medicine practices, the plant is prepared as a powder or infusion for use in herbal remedies.
